IRequest Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IRequest type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Content Obsolete.
Returns the content of the request body.
Context
Returns the web request.
HttpMethod
Returns the used HTTP method.
MethodSet
Returns the method set through which the method was called.
Parameters
Returns the set of parameters, which is the union of the RouteValues and Query parameters.
Resolver
Returns a service resolver.
Response
Gets the response that will be sent to the client.
Route
Returns the called route.
Session
Returns the associated database session.
SessionGroup
SessionStatus
Returns the state of the session associated with this request.
Top
See Also

Reference

IRequest Interface
QBM.CompositionApi.Handling Namespace
